---
title: "Set up your first menu"
description: "The shortest path from signup to a live Rumizi menu on your tables."
sidebarTitle: "First menu"
icon: "rocket"
---

This is the ten-minute path. If you already have your menu as a photo, PDF,
or web page, you can have a working digital menu in one sitting.

<Steps>
  <Step title="Create your venue">
    Go to [rumizi.com](https://rumizi.com) and start the signup. I'll ask for
    your venue name and a short URL (for example `bella-napoli`). That short
    URL becomes your public link: `rumizi.com/bella-napoli`.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Sign in with a magic link">
    Rumizi uses passwordless sign-in. Check your email for the link and open
    it on the device you want to manage the menu from.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Upload your existing menu">
    From your workspace, open **Menus → New menu** and drop in a photo, a
    PDF, or paste a link to your current menu page. The AI reads it into
    editable items. Full walk-through: [Upload a menu file](/vendors/menu/upload).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Review the extracted items">
    Open the draft menu and scan it category by category. Fix any prices the
    AI guessed, drop items that don't exist any more, and fill in
    descriptions that are missing.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Add photos (optional, but recommended)">
    In each item dialog, upload a photo or generate one with the AI. Items
    with photos convert better. See [Media gallery](/vendors/media/gallery).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Publish">
    When the menu looks right, tap **Publish**. Diners now see it at
    `rumizi.com/your-venue`. Full details: [Publish and preview](/vendors/menu/publish).
  </Step>
  <Step title="Print your QR code">
    From your workspace header, open the QR code and print it for tables and
    table tents. Any phone camera can scan it — no app required.
  </Step>
</Steps>

## What you get on day one

- A mobile-first menu at a clean URL (`rumizi.com/your-venue`).
- A shared cart so a whole table can add items together.
- Built-in translations for any language you add.
- An AI assistant diners can ask about dishes, allergens, and pairings.
- A workspace for you and your staff to edit prices, mark items out of stock,
  and publish in one tap.

## Next steps

    Offer your menu in a second or third language.

    Schedule a breakfast, lunch, and dinner menu so the right one is visible
    at the right time.

    Show a hero image, your story, and opening hours above the menu.

    Rumizi is free; you only pay for AI usage. Every venue starts with
    $20 of free AI credit.
  </Card>
